testcase.name: AOVT01_variant_with_single_endpoint_is_produced_correctly
testcase.failure: Snapshot of code has changed: old[6:18] vs new[6:18] ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————— Unadjusted comparison n 68 73 62 - Mean 3.68 5.07 3.09 + Mean 3.682 5.065 3.091 Difference in Means 1.38 -0.59 95% CI (-2.76, 5.53) (-4.91, 3.73) p-value 0.5113 0.7873 Adjusted comparison (covariates BASE and STRATA1) n 68 73 62 - Adjusted Mean 4.06 3.57 3.34 + Adjusted Mean 4.064 3.572 3.340 Difference in Adjusted Means -0.49 -0.72 95% CI (-3.28, 2.29) (-3.57, 2.12) p-value 0.7277 0.6165

testcase.name: AOVT01_variant_with_multiple_endpoints_is_produced_correctly

testcase.name: AOVT03_is_produced_correctly
testcase.failure: Snapshot of code has changed: old[7:25] vs new[7:25] BFI All Questions WEEK 1 DAY 8 n 68 73 62 - Adjusted Mean 4.34 5.96 3.90 + Adjusted Mean 4.340 5.955 3.902 Difference in Adjusted Means 1.62 -0.44 95% CI (-1.75, 4.98) (-3.94, 3.06) p-value 0.3460 0.8059 WEEK 2 DAY 15 n 68 73 62 - Adjusted Mean 12.99 11.23 9.86 + Adjusted Mean 12.989 11.230 9.857 Difference in Adjusted Means -1.76 -3.13 95% CI (-5.12, 1.60) (-6.64, 0.37) p-value 0.3048 0.0795 WEEK 5 DAY 36 n 68 73 62 - Adjusted Mean 23.88 23.08 28.21 + Adjusted Mean 23.882 23.077 28.212 Difference in Adjusted Means -0.81 4.33 95% CI (-4.17, 2.56) (0.83, 7.83) p-value 0.6383 0.0155 old[26:44] vs new[26:44] Fatigue Interference WEEK 1 DAY 8 n 68 73 62 - Adjusted Mean 5.97 5.19 5.21 + Adjusted Mean 5.970 5.192 5.209 Difference in Adjusted Means -0.78 -0.76 95% CI (-4.17, 2.61) (-4.30, 2.78) p-value 0.6522 0.6729 WEEK 2 DAY 15 n 68 73 62 - Adjusted Mean 11.39 9.42 9.55 + Adjusted Mean 11.385 9.423 9.550 Difference in Adjusted Means -1.96 -1.84 95% CI (-5.35, 1.43) (-5.37, 1.70) p-value 0.2560 0.3084 WEEK 5 DAY 36 n 68 73 62 - Adjusted Mean 22.79 25.37 23.43 + Adjusted Mean 22.787 25.368 23.430 Difference in Adjusted Means 2.58 0.64 95% CI (-0.81, 5.97) (-2.89, 4.18) p-value 0.1353 0.7212
